DvePercentaPage.metaDescription: How to donate 2% of taxes to Radio TLIS — procedure, necessary data, and contacts.
DvePercentaPage.heading: two percent
DvePercentaPage.intro_p1: The TLIS Dormitory Radio Studio (IRŠ TLIS) is the only student radio studio in Bratislava. We give students and non-students space and the opportunity to realize themselves in the creation of audiovisual production - creating radio shows, music playlists, or organizing music events. We offer the chance to try working in the mass media sphere - whether from behind the microphone, the technical desk, or the organizational and promotional background. Our goal is to provide students and volunteers with invaluable practice and thus raise new generations of hosts, music editors, dramaturgs, editors-in-chief, technicians, and marketers focused not only on the music industry.
DvePercentaPage.intro_p2: If you have nowhere else, give it to us. Your support helps us continue our activities and develop new projects.
DvePercentaPage.employer_section_title: Your tax return is filed by your employer:
DvePercentaPage.employer_step1: Ask your employer to perform the annual settlement of income tax advances. Your employer will then issue and confirm the
DvePercentaPage.employer_step1_link: Confirmation of payment of income tax from employment.
DvePercentaPage.employer_step2_link: Declaration of allocation of an amount up to 2% of the paid income tax of a natural person.
DvePercentaPage.self_section_title: You file your tax return yourself:
DvePercentaPage.self_p1: You allocate 2% by filling in the boxes directly in the tax return. You can allocate them to us if you have no income tax arrears from the past and the amount of 2% of the tax is at least 3.33 euros.
DvePercentaPage.self_step1: Fill out the 'Declaration on the allocation of a portion of paid income tax of a natural person according to § 50 of the Act' in the tax return.
DvePercentaPage.help_note: If you need help filling out the forms, contact us.

GdprPage.heading: GDPR and Personal Data Protection
GdprPage.section1_text: Our service does not collect any personal data from users. Exclusively anonymized radio listening statistics are used for analytical purposes and improving the quality of provided services. These statistics do not allow for the identification of individuals.
GdprPage.section2_text: The service uses cookies to store a session identifier (sessionId). This identifier allows for the correct functioning of the player and the maintenance of your session. The sessionId does not contain any personal data and is used exclusively for technical purposes.
GdprPage.section3_text: Anonymized statistics and sessionId are processed and stored securely in accordance with applicable legal regulations, including GDPR. Only authorized persons have access to the data, and it is protected against unauthorized access.
GdprPage.section4_text: Users have the right to access data that was not collected about them, as well as the right to file a complaint with the supervisory authority if they suspect that a violation of personal data protection has occurred. Due to the anonymous nature of the collected data, it is not possible to identify specific individuals.

ownership.title: 1. Ownership Rights
ownership.content: All podcasts published on this platform are our exclusive property and are protected by copyright. No part of the podcasts may be reproduced, distributed, or otherwise used without express permission, unless otherwise stated.

sharing.title: 2. Sharing and Redistribution
sharing.content: Podcasts may be shared or redistributed only if appropriate attribution to the author and source is provided. Without attribution, such use is prohibited.

responsibility.title: 3. User Responsibility
responsibility.content: Users are responsible for complying with these terms in any interaction with podcast content. Violation of copyright or sharing rules may lead to legal action.

changes.title: 4. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Updates will be posted on this page, and by continuing to use the service, you agree to the new terms.

AboutPage.metaDescription: About Radio TLIS — who we are, what we broadcast, and why we do radio differently. Get to know our team and history.
AboutPage.metaDescriptionOg: About Radio TLIS — who we are, what we broadcast, and why we do radio differently.
AboutPage.heading: who we are
AboutPage.p1: Radio TLIS is the voice of student freedom, creativity, and alternatives. For years, we have been bringing original radio broadcasting focused on the independent music scene, culture, art, and the lives of young people. Thanks to the courage to go outside the mainstream and the freedom to choose topics and music, we have become a unique phenomenon of the Bratislava region.
AboutPage.p2: We don't broadcast for profit or under the baton of big players — with us, ideas, the desire to create, and the voice of young people decide. We are the only student radio in the Bratislava Region and at the same time the only one in Slovakia that consistently deals with alternative genres.
AboutPage.p3_suffix: , but Radio TLIS doesn't end with turning off the microphones. We meet at meetings, organize workshops, work parties, and – yes – even student bashes. Each of us functions here at our own pace, but we are united by a common passion: doing radio differently.

ContactPage.metaDescription: Contact Radio TLIS — email addresses and information on how to get in touch with us.
ContactPage.heading: contact
ContactPage.p1: If you have a compelling need to contact Radio TLIS, or a member of the radio, of course, you can do so. We have several email addresses for you that can help you target your questions, requests, or praise as accurately as possible.
